# PHIL.009 ? Neoplatonism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** neoplatonism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
The One as ultimate reality; emanation of being; mystical union; hierarchical reality from spiritual to material; contemplation as path to divine

## Application
Seek unity underlying multiplicity; move from material to spiritual understanding; value contemplation; recognize hierarchical ordering of reality

## Key Values
- Divine unity
- Spiritual hierarchy
- Mystical insight
- Transcendence

## Tags
philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, neoplatonism
